place: Sunset Cove Estate, Plai Laem, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Oceanfront Five-Bedroom Sunset Villa, Plai Laem
blurb: A newly refurbished oceanfront villa on the north-east tip of Koh Samui, in the gated Sunset Cove Estate opposite Six Senses — built over four levels for uninterrupted bay and Koh Phangan views, with a 14-metre saltwater infinity pool, gym, games room and a lawn path down to the sea.
detail:
Ideally located on the north-eastern tip of Koh Samui in the exclusive Sunset Cove Estate — opposite the renowned Six Senses Samui — this magnificent, newly refurbished oceanfront villa hosts up to 10 adults and 4 children across five double bedrooms plus a children's bunk room. Built over four levels, each offers uncompromising views of the sea, the local bays and the hills of neighbouring Koh Phangan; the entrance crosses a koi-carp pond before the ocean view snaps sharply into focus.

The sea-facing bedrooms have king beds, floor-to-ceiling windows, smart TVs and 'secret' wardrobe-hidden bathrooms, with two pavilions cleverly arranged as family suites that connect to an adjoining room or the kids' bunk room. The heart of the home is a full-width, open-plan living level behind floor-to-ceiling glass: cozy sofas with an 85-inch 8K TV, a dining table for 12, a breakfast bar, and a superbly equipped kitchen with twin islands, twin fridge-freezers and a chilled wine cellar — plus a separate Thai kitchen for the staff. An air-conditioned gym with a Pilates reformer, a pool table, a home office and even a telescope for the star-filled sky round out the level.

The travertine terrace takes in Plai Laem bay, the Big Buddha, Bangrak and Fisherman's Village, with built-in shade screens, alfresco dining and a Weber BBQ. The 14-metre saltwater infinity pool has swim-up stools at one end and a shallow play area at the other; below, a grassy lawn and a paved path over ancient rocks lead to the sea, where two double kayaks await for the ten-minute paddle to tiny Koh Som. Served by a Thai chef, villa manager and team, with daily breakfast and airport transfers — and licensed for small weddings with a clear stage set in the pool.

features.l: Oceanfront · lawn path to the sea
